# Sale Order Product Availability Inline

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:90d17403514c04b824b2204ad21e24a197914a9278af7e0a9cf1518d1e01332c
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module extends the functionality of 'Sales and Warehouse Management'
to show you the stock availability (Free To Use Quantity) of each product
as part of its name in the product drop-down widget on sales order lines.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

1. Go to *Sales > Orders > Orders* and choose an existing sales order or
   create a new one.
2. Click on 'Add a product' under 'Order Lines' tab, then click on 'Product'
   field to deploy products list.
3. You will see stock availability (Free To Use Quantity) of each product as
   part of their name.
